task.title: Fix Discrepancy and Prepare for Phase 3
task.context: Discrepancy identified: Import script has 556 rows, batch deliverables specify 548. 8 extra services from research. No options needed — fix the script to 548, clean import, verify, proceed to Phase 3 (Onboarding UI).
task.instructions:
## Task: Fix Script to 548 Services and Clean Import
### Step 1: Remove 8 Extra Services from Import Script
Edit: scripts/import_all_services.sql
Remove these 8 rows (from the 8 industries with extras): - Landscaping: 2 extra services - Tree Work: 1 extra service - Masonry: 1 extra service - Painting: 1 extra service - Flooring: 1 extra service - Carpentry: 1 extra service - Windows/Doors: 1 extra service
Total rows to remove: 8 Final row count: 548 (matching batch deliverables)
Save updated script.
### Step 2: Create Clean Import Script
Create: scripts/clean_import_exact_548.sql
Content: ```sql -- Clean Import: 548 Services (Exact Match with Batch Deliverables) -- Created: 2026-03-16 -- Purpose: TRUNCATE and reimport to align DB with research (548 services)
-- Step 1: Truncate table TRUNCATE master_service_library CASCADE;
-- Step 2: Import from updated script -- (Paste contents of scripts/import_all_services.sql here) ```
### Step 3: Execute Clean Import in Supabase SQL Editor
1. Open Supabase SQL Editor for project: pocket-hq-mobile-app 2. Run: TRUNCATE master_service_library CASCADE; 3. Run scripts/import_all_services.sql (updated to 548 services) 4. Verify: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_service_library; → Expected: 548 5. Verify: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT industry) FROM master_service_library; → Expected: 19 6. Verify: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT service_category) FROM master_service_library; → Expected: 104+
### Step 4: Create Verification Summary
Create: docs/research/DATABASE_FIXED_548.md
Content: ```markdown # Database Fixed: 548 Services
## Changes Made
- Edited scripts/import_all_services.sql: Removed 8 extra services - Created scripts/clean_import_exact_548.sql - Truncated master_service_library CASCADE - Reimported from updated script (548 services)
## Final State
- Total Services: 548 ✓ - Industries: 19 ✓ - Categories: 104+ ✓
## Verification
```sql SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_service_library; -- Result: 548
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT industry) FROM master_service_library; -- Result: 19
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT service_category) FROM master_service_library; -- Result: 104+ ```
## Status
✓ Database aligned with batch deliverables (548 services) ✓ Ready for Phase 3: Build Onboarding UI ```
### Step 5: Push Changes to GitHub
Commit changes: ```bash git add scripts/import_all_services.sql scripts/clean_import_exact_548.sql docs/research/DATABASE_FIXED_548.md git commit -m "Fix: Reduce import script from 556 to 548 services (match batch deliverables)" git push origin master ```
task.success_criteria: - scripts/import_all_services.sql edited (556 → 548 rows) - scripts/clean_import_exact_548.sql created - Database truncated in Supabase SQL Editor - Updated import script executed (548 services imported) - COUNT(*) verified: 548 - Industries verified: 19 - Categories verified: 104+ - docs/research/DATABASE_FIXED_548.md created - Changes committed and pushed to GitHub

phase.title: Build Onboarding UI
phase.prerequisites: Database fixed: 548 services imported, verified, aligned with batch deliverables
